hero.subtitle: Premium industrial textile manufacturer trusted by global fashion houses, sportswear leaders, and industrial partners across 50+ countries.

hero.label: EST. 2010
hero.title: Ylmar Textile Industries
hero.subtitle: An Egyptian manufacturer of textile components and garment accessories, producing tapes, cords, elastics, knitwear, printing and dyeing for factories and brands at home and abroad.

story.label: WHO WE ARE
story.title: Built in 10th of Ramadan, Since 2010
story.p1: Ylmar Textile Industries is an Egyptian factory specialized in producing components for the textile and ready-made garment industries. Founded in 2010 in 10th of Ramadan City — one of the largest industrial cities in the Middle East.
story.p2: From day one, we have committed to high-quality products built on the latest manufacturing technology, the best raw materials, and modern production lines serving both the local market and export markets. Continuous development and innovation let us deliver complete solutions for garments, textiles, footwear, bags, upholstery and many other industries.
story.p3: We hold accredited quality certifications that reflect our commitment to the highest standards of quality and production — making us a trusted partner for a wide range of factories and brands.

vision.label: DIRECTION
vision.title: Vision & Mission
vision.visionBody: To be among the leaders in the textile components industry in Egypt and the Middle East, delivering innovative products of world-class quality at competitive prices, while building long-term partnerships with our clients.
vision.missionBody: To provide textile products that meet the highest standards of quality and precision, to offer flexible manufacturing solutions that fit each client's needs, and to remain committed to continuous development and the very best level of customer service.

why.label: WHY YLMAR
why.title: Why Choose Ylmar
why.subtitle: Eleven reasons factories and brands across Egypt and beyond keep coming back.
why.i1: Over 15 years of experience in textile industries
why.i3: Strategic location in 10th of Ramadan City
why.i6: Manufacturing in all sizes, colors and specifications
why.i7: Fully custom products made to client requirements
why.i10: Dedicated custom printing and dyeing services

divisions.label: CAPABILITIES
divisions.title: Six Production Divisions
divisions.subtitle: A complete range of textile components, produced in any size, color and specification.
divisions.tapesBody: Cleaning, belt, PEA, tubular, cordella, bag, checkerboard and mattress edge tapes — in polyester, spun and raw cotton, in any width, color or specification.
divisions.cordsBody: Twisted, flat, tubular, leak-proof stitched and medical mask elastic cords — with transparent capsules, plastic or metal end tips, and client logo printing.
divisions.elasticBody: Crochet, woven, sandwich, twisted, jacquard and buttonhole elastics — in varying grades of softness, stretch and quality to suit every use.
divisions.printingBody: Printing on cords, tapes, crochet, woven and Gipex elastic and knitwear, plus embossed and engraved printing — for logos, brand marks and special colors.
divisions.dyeingBody: A dedicated dyeing department using the latest technology for color fastness: polyester and spun yarns, zipper tape, contract tape and cord dyeing, sandwich elastic and lace.
divisions.knittingBody: Knitted trico produced to international specifications on the latest machinery — solid, interwoven melange, and knitted cord, in every size and color.

sectors.label: WHO WE SERVE
sectors.title: Sectors We Supply
sectors.subtitle: Ylmar components go into a wide range of industries.

quality.label: QUALITY
quality.title: Quality Is the Basis of Everything We Do
quality.body: We apply rigorous control procedures at every stage of production — from raw material selection through to the finished product — to guarantee products that conform to specification and achieve the highest levels of client satisfaction.

cta.label: WORK WITH US
cta.title: Looking for a Reliable Industrial Partner?
cta.subtitle: If you are looking for high-quality textile products with full custom manufacturing, Ylmar Textile Industries is the right choice. We are glad to work with companies and factories inside Egypt and abroad.

products.label: PORTFOLIO
products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Eight specialized textile product lines crafted to the highest industrial standards — from intricate jacquard weaves to high-performance elastic systems.

inspection.description: Multi-stage quality control at every production phase, ensuring every meter meets our exacting standards.

packaging.description: Professional packaging solutions tailored to client specifications and international shipping requirements.

export.description: Reliable logistics network serving 50+ countries with consistent lead times and full documentation support.

sustainability.label: RESPONSIBILITY
sustainability.title: Committed to Sustainability
sustainability.subtitle: Manufacturing excellence and environmental responsibility are not opposing forces at Ylmar.
sustainability.body: At Ylmar, we believe that industrial excellence and environmental stewardship go hand in hand. Our sustainability initiatives span our entire production chain — from raw material sourcing to final delivery.

water.title: Water Conservation
water.description: Reduction in water usage through closed-loop dyeing systems

recycled.description: Of production uses recycled or sustainable raw materials

oeko.description: Every component tested for harmful substances. Safe for skin contact across all age groups.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Common Questions
faq.q1: What is the minimum order quantity?
faq.a1: MOQ varies by product — typically 200m for webbing, 500m for elastic and jacquard, and 1000m for standard elastic bands. Custom products are negotiated per project.
faq.a2: Standard products ship in 2–4 weeks. Custom jacquard and specialty items require 4–8 weeks. Rush orders are available — contact us to discuss.
faq.a3: Yes. Sample requests for standard products are fulfilled within 5 business days at no charge. Custom samples are priced based on complexity.
faq.q4: What certifications do your products carry?
faq.a4: Products carry OEKO-TEX Standard 100, ISO 9001:2015, and GRS certifications. Client-specific compliance packages are available on request.
